title: Excellent Team is moving
excerpt: We decided to move our apps for monday.com to a different domain, hosted by Amazon Web Services (AWS). The reason for this is that we wanted to be closer to the monday.com infrastructure and the new domain servicing our …

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
We decided to move our apps for monday.com to a different domain, hosted by Amazon Web Services (AWS). The reason for this is that we wanted to be closer to the monday.com infrastructure and the new domain servicing our apps is hosted in the same AWS datacenter. In early testing we have seen an improvement in latency of over 50%.

Unfortunately moving our complete infrastructure requires a little downtime.

On Saturday October 22 at 08.00 UTC we will shut down all apps for monday.com. This will give us the opportunity to move the database holding the app configuration to the new domain and update all our apps. We expect to be live in the new domain before Saturday October 22 at 09.00 UTC. There is no need to reconfigure the integrations on your side.

The Excellent Team
